articles.title: Forza Horizon 6 Is Every Japanese Driving Fantasy Rolled into One: Hands-On Preview - IGN
articles.description: The Forza Horizon series took a long time to land in Japan. After a few days in its meticulously modelled map, I’m doubtful I’ll ever want to leave.

articles.title: Marathon Budget Reportedly Revealed - IGN
articles.description: A new report has claimed Marathon’s budget is over $200 million, and while player numbers have fallen significantly since launch, Bungie’s extraction shooter is allegedly not facing an imminent shutdown.

articles.title: Google Chrome adds infostealer protection against session cookie theft - BleepingComputer
articles.description: Google has rolled out Device Bound Session Credentials (DBSC) protection in Chrome 146 for Windows, designed to block info-stealing malware from harvesting session cookies.

articles.title: You can now edit your Instagram comments - TechCrunch
articles.description: Instagram users can now edit comments, which is a long-awaited fix for anyone who’s ever had to delete and re-post a comment just to fix a typo.

articles.description: Nintendo released the casual game for Switch and Android and iOS mobile devices, free of charge. It's called Hello Yoshi.

articles.title: Kiln: Double Fine Shares Their Favorite Pots as Open Beta Goes Live - Xbox Wire
articles.description: Now’s your chance to sample Kiln before launch on April 23 during the Open Beta Throwdown on Steam – and Double Fine is here to help inspire your creations with some of their most-favorite pots! Pre-order Kiln today on Xbox, PlayStation, and PC.

articles.title: Don’t Starve Elsewhere announced for PC - Gematsu
articles.description: Klei has announced Don’t Starve Elsewhere, a new Don’t Starve survival game. It will launch for PC via Steam. A release date was not announced.
